description_long: This is a large, blue semi-truck with a prominent front grille and two vertical exhaust stacks rising behind the cab. The cab is boxy and features dark-tinted windows, with side mirrors extending outward for visibility. The truck has a long chassis with a sleeper cab configuration, and the rear section is designed to accommodate a trailer, featuring dual rear axles and six wheels in total. The front bumper is black with two round headlights, and the rear has three red taillights on each side. The truck's body is primarily blue with black accents on the lower panels, wheel arches, and exhaust stacks. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty hauling in urban and highway environments.
description: A large blue semi-truck with a sleeper cab, dual rear axles, and black accents, designed for heavy-duty hauling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, two round headlights, and the boxy blue cab with vertical exhaust stacks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long chassis, sleeper cab, dual rear axles, and extended side mirrors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual rear axles, three red taillights on each side, and the back of the sleeper cab.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, chassis, and wheel arrangement with black and blue color scheme.
